_comment: Tier-2 Layer-C: fenics Stokes MMS — third physics anchor. Tests Taylor-Hood mixed-element catalog API (basix.ufl.mixed_element with P2-vector + P1-scalar), saddle-point system + MUMPS direct solve, pressure-pinning at a single DOF (Stokes with Dirichlet u has p only determined up to constant). MMS: stream function ψ = sin(πx)²·sin(πy)² → u = curl(ψ) = (π·sin(πx)²·sin(2πy), -π·sin(2πx)·sin(πy)²) which is divergence-free by construction; p = sin(πx)·cos(πy) (zero mean on [0,1]² since ∫cos(πy)dy=0). f computed UFL-symbolically as -ν·Δu + grad(p). Asserts P2 u L2 error <= 5e-4, P1 p L2 error <= 5e-3, P2 u EOC in [2.5, 3.5] (theoretical 3.0 for L2), P1 p EOC in [1.7, 3.0] (theoretical 2.0 but Taylor-Hood SUPER-CONVERGES on Cartesian-symmetric meshes to ~2.6+). Verified on 2026-06-01: u L2 = 1.40e-4, p L2 = 4.43e-4, u EOC=2.996, p EOC=2.634.
